questions.text: Please provide a brief description of your business or organisation and explain your interest in the Acquisition, including any commercial relationships with Ramsay and Healthscope.
Do you have any concerns with the Acquisition? If so, please provide further details.

How closely do the following private hospitals compete with each other in the supply of private hospital services? In your response, you may wish to consider factors such as the services and specialities available at each hospital, medical officers, facilities, location, quality of care, safety, innovation and pricing. a. National Capital Private Hospital and Ramsay’s Nowra Private Hospital b. National Capital Private Hospital and Ramsay’s Southern Highlands Private Hospital
Are there any other Ramsay-owned businesses that compete with National Capital Private Hospital or supply services to competitors of National Capital Private Hospital?

Please list any other hospitals, including day surgeries, that compete with National Capital Private Hospital. Please explain your response and identify any services or specialities these hospitals and day surgeries compete closely on.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
